response: ## Accessibility Issue: Buy link missing discernible text (WCAG 2.4.4) **Bug ID:** `A11Y-67d9fb45` (instance) / `A11Y-fa082480` (pattern) **URL:** https://shop.example.test/pricing **XPath:** `//*[@id="plans"]/a[@class="buy"]` **Full DOM path:** N/A — not emitted by axe target data; confirm via DevTools **WCAG SC:** 2.4.4 — Link Purpose (In Context) (Level A) **Rule:** axe-core — `link-name` **Severity:** High **Frequency:** 1 instance on this page **Screen type:** desktop | **Colour mode:** light ### HTML Snippet ```html ``` ### Description The buy link contains only an icon with no accessible name. ### Steps to Reproduce 1. Go to https://shop.example.test/pricing 2. Inspect the accessible name of the buy link ### Expected Behaviour Link announces a meaningful name. ### Actual Behaviour Link announces nothing. ### Testing Environment | Item | Value | |---|---| | Browser | Chrome 126 | | Screen reader | N/A — automated scan |
